visual: Data Tables (Numeric Display). "Laps Completed" — Runner A=20, Runner B=50, Runner C=35, Runner D=45. Horizontal layout.
visual_2: Bar Graphs (Mode 2: Creating). Vertical. Scale of 10, axis 0–60. 3 of 4 bars pre-filled: Runner A=20, Runner B=50, Runner D=45. Runner C bar empty. Ghost gridlines at 5s visible. Snap-to-5 enabled. Click-to-set.
guide: "Runner C completed 35 laps. Set the bar for Runner C to show 35."
